29c5d658971570e1fb05f8446c7fed746cc012c8.summary: Machine Learning Scientist with over 5 years of post-PhD experience in ML/AI. Strong skills in model development and performance evaluation, proficient in Python and deep learning frameworks, and experienced in incubating and delivering projects from proof-of-concept to production.

experience.title: Machine Learning Scientist
experience.description: Leading research on bias mitigation technologies in NLP and building/deploying ML solutions for Alexa Shopping. Previously developed a deep generative model for universal speech synthesis for Alexa Text-to-Speech Research team, scaling production across multiple regions.

experience.title: Postdoctoral Research Scientist
experience.description: Led research in a multi-organizational project developing novel methods for longitudinal modelling of complex disease using multi-modal data integration. Supervised master's theses in the Department of Statistics.

experience.title: Doctoral Researcher
experience.description: Researched kernel methods and representation learning of non-tabular data such as rank data and graphs. Applied findings to breast cancer survival prediction using genetic data. Placed 2nd in the DREAM Toxicogenetics Challenge.

experience.title: Data Scientist Intern
experience.description: Proposed a data pipeline to process large-scale unstructured machinery performance data and built a predictive model for failure states in automated immunoassay analysers. Patented the solution.

education.institution: Centre for Computational Biology, Paris Sciences et Lettres - PSL Research University
Department of Mathematics, University of Paris-Saclay
Department of Mathematics, University of Science & Technology of China

0ca5a21eaba5bca882c8b7c7761660b4c5189b93.summary: With 5 years as a Reliability Engineer, I specialize in enhancing equipment functionality and operational efficiency. My expertise in predictive maintenance and data analysis has driven significant improvements in system reliability. I am dedicated to implementing innovative solutions that align with industry standards and foster a culture of continuous improvement.
skills: Failure Mode Effects and Criticality Analysis (FMECA)

experience.title: Reliability Engineer I
experience.description: Conducted comprehensive reliability studies, providing actionable recommendations to enhance equipment performance and operational strategies. Led Root Cause Failure Analysis (RCFA) teams to diagnose equipment failures and develop effective maintenance protocols. Utilized historical data analysis to propose enhancements that minimized life cycle costs across diverse equipment classes. Formulated and assessed Predictive and Preventative Maintenance plans, ensuring their effectiveness for critical assets. Authored and reviewed inspection briefs for pressure vessels, storage tanks, and piping systems across multiple sites. Collaborated with external inspection teams to ensure regulatory compliance in pressure vessel and tank inspections. Served as an API 510 Certified Inspector, overseeing pressure vessel inspections and ensuring adherence to safety standards.

experience.title: Reliability Engineer
experience.description: Established a comprehensive Reliability Program, outlining specifications and resource allocations. Designed Reliability Block Diagrams and Fault Tree Diagrams to visualize system reliability and failure modes. Collaborated with corporate executives to develop innovative methodologies for Reliability Analysis. Executed detailed Reliability and Probability of Loss analyses on aerospace systems using advanced software tools. Conducted Failure Mode Effects and Criticality Analysis (FMECA) to identify potential failure impacts.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering

experience.title: Quantitative Analyst for Investment
experience.description: Implemented quantitative trading models, developed and tested quant trading strategies using statistical & numerical methods and MATLAB & Python within all A-shares and H-shares to provide trading suggestions for clients. Designed and backtested optimization algorithms for portfolio construction and provided recommendations for clients. Researched newly introduced data terminals and quantitative databases to generalize them in department and applied them to initial practical use.

experience.title: Analyst for Risk Management and Sales
experience.description: Conducted risk assessment for real estate loans and improved risk management strategy by resolving identity information issues using MATLAB and image processing software and completed promptly for inspection. Advertised loan transaction and connected with clients, resulting in increased sales of main products by over 50%. Composed credit investigation materials for over 500 users and shorten the work period by half.

education.degree: Master of Science in Quantitative Finance and Risk Management
Bachelor of Economics in Financial Engineering

certifications: SAS Certified Advanced Programmer for SAS 9
SAS Certified Base Programmer for SAS 9
China Undergraduate Mathematical Contest in Modeling The second prize in Hubei Province
